posts.author: gpolanco (German Polanco)
posts.cookedHtml:
Att: Monday CRM Development Team

In my deals I have 4 groups that represent each Quarter of 2024 and on each of them are the opportunities we as a company expect to close this year.

What do we need?

We need to create an automation that when somebody changes the “Expected Close Date” the opportunity goes immediately to the correspondent quarter without the intervention of anybody.

Example: The actual expected close date of opportunity “ABC” is 01/08/2024 and is in the Q1 and then the salesperson has to change it to 03/01/2024 the system must execute the automation a put the deal on the Q2 group automatically.

Please let me know if you can make a development to achieve my goal.

Best Regards,

German P.
